name: Assistance to Individuals in Crisis Situation (AICS)
description: Immediate financial or material aid for Filipinos facing sudden crisis — medical emergency, death in family, fire, or displacement
benefits: Medical, burial, transportation, or educational assistance (amount varies by LGU, typically ₱3,000–₱15,000)
documents: Barangay Certificate of Indigency or Residency
Medical Certificate or Hospital Bill (for medical aid)
office: Municipal/City Social Welfare and Development Office (MSWDO) or DSWD Field Office
next_steps: Visit your MSWDO with supporting documents for your crisis type
Request a social case study interview with a social worker
Submit requirements and wait for assessment (usually same-day to 3 days)
Receive guarantee letter or direct assistance if approved
